items.label: Install pyenv + Python 3.11.8, clone the repo, set the local version
Install dependencies with Poetry; add Poe the Poet as the task runner
Spin up local infra with Docker (ZenML + MongoDB + Qdrant)
Create an AWS account + IAM access key; configure the AWS CLI
Fill .env with OpenAI + Hugging Face tokens
Build crawlers for Medium / Substack / LinkedIn / GitHub
Model documents with an ODM and store raw data in MongoDB
Wire the digital_data_etl ZenML pipeline + steps
Clean → chunk → embed documents
Load embeddings into Qdrant (the vector DB)
Implement advanced retrieval: query expansion, self-querying, reranking
Generate the instruction dataset from your cleaned data
Fine-tune with LoRA/QLoRA (Unsloth), tracking runs in Comet ML
Push the fine-tuned model to the Hugging Face registry
Build a preference (chosen/rejected) dataset
Align the model with DPO
Evaluate the fine-tuned LLM (general + task-specific)
Evaluate the RAG pipeline (retrieval + answer quality)
Quantize the model; pick a serving strategy
Apply speed/throughput techniques (batching, KV cache, speculative decoding)
Build the retrieval + generation inference service
Assemble the RAG prompt and wire prompt monitoring (Opik)
Deploy the model to a SageMaker endpoint
Expose a FastAPI REST API with autoscaling
Set up CI/CD/CT (GitHub Actions) for code, models and pipelines
Add monitoring, alerting and the model/artifact registries
